headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; img-src * data: blob:; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co https://vitals.vercel-insights.com; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; upgrade-insecure-requests;
